inputs.label: Measurement System
inputs.businessContext: 0 = Metric (kg, cm), 1 = Imperial (stones, pounds, feet, inches)

inputs.label: Weight (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Body weight in kilograms, used when Metric system selected

inputs.label: Height (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Body height in centimeters, used when Metric system selected

inputs.label: Weight - Stones
inputs.businessContext: Whole number of stones, used when Imperial system selected

inputs.label: Weight - Pounds
inputs.businessContext: Additional pounds beyond stones, used when Imperial system selected

inputs.label: Height - Feet
inputs.businessContext: Whole number of feet, used when Imperial system selected

inputs.label: Height - Inches
inputs.businessContext: Additional inches beyond feet, used when Imperial system selected
